title: Yrashu mace
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yrashu maces''' were simple but effective weapon made of the roots of a [[hmumfmumf tree]]. It was the preferred weapon of the [[Yrashu]] people.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Way of the Yrashu}}
